zh.Ewelme, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾尤爾梅
zh.Witchingham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可維其加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bateman於大約1260年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親Adam Bateman22歲，母親Basilia Sherewynd17歲。他和Margery Le Cementarii至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1328年在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年69歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可海加姆。

zh-hans.Witchingham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可維其加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bateman于大约1260年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其时，他的父亲Adam Bateman22岁，母亲Basilia Sherewynd17岁。他和Margery Le Cementarii至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1328年在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年69岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可海加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bateman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bateman, Bat(te)man, and in the West Midlands of England Batemon, a pet form of Bate or Batte with the hypocoristic suffix -man.

variants.name: Batman
meanings: Turkish: from batman, the name of an old measure of weight, regionally also meaning ‘big jug’ and ‘heavy’, applied as an ornamental name or perhaps as a nickname for a heavy man.

variants.name: Bate
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Bate. It could represent an unrecorded Old English name Bata, or a form of Batte, a short form of Anglo-Norman French names beginning with Bart-, such as Bartelmeu (see Bartholomew ) or Bartram (see Bertram ).
perhaps a topographic name from an unrecorded Middle English antecedent of the modern English dialect bate ‘river island or land liable to flooding’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bateman was born about 1260, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam Bateman, was 22 and his mother, Basilia Sherewynd, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Margery Le Cementarii. He died in 1328, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Heigham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bateman est né environ 1260, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam Bateman, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Basilia Sherewynd, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Margery Le Cementarii. Il est décédé en 1328, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Heigham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bateman um 1260 in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Bateman 22 und seine Mutter Basilia Sherewynd 17. Er hatte mit Margery Le Cementarii mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1328 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Heigham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bateman è nato il circa 1260 nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam Bateman, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Basilia Sherewynd, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Margery Le Cementarii. Morì nel 1328, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Heigham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Batemanが約1260年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父Adam Batemanは22歳，母Basilia Sherewyndは17歳であった。彼はMargery Le Cementariiとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1328年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで69歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクヘイガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bateman(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Bateman(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Basilia Sherewynd(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Margery Le Cementarii(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 헤이아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bateman nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam Bateman, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Basilia Sherewynd, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Margery Le Cementarii. Ele faleceu em 1328, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Heigham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bateman родился около 1260 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam Bateman было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Basilia Sherewynd, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Margery Le Cementarii. Он умер в 1328 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности хигам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bateman nació aproximadamente 1260, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam Bateman, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Basilia Sherewynd, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Margery Le Cementarii. Murió en 1328, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Heigham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
